---
title: "EWG 3.1: Food Provisioning"
format: html
---

<div class="button-container">
  <a href="ewg31_fp_spanish.html" class="custom-button">
    <i class="fas fa-globe"></i> en español
  </a>
</div>

# ![](figs/food-provisioning.svg){width=8% height=8%} Food Provisioning

## Executive summary

The Food Provisioning (FP) goal executive summary is available for expert review in the documents below. These materials summarize the goal model, key decisions, and early results for discussion with the EWG 3.1 expert working group.

- **English:** [FP Executive Summary (July 2026)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1sYug__6lxXjE_Vg3zW0etdAqZKKU3eJZtiX4bzd7UZA/edit?usp=drive_link)
- **Español:** [FP Resumen Ejecutivo (Julio 2026)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uvmC99z4ZNi7pv5NdgYGATG8WRFpqUipA0c1H4NqPiw/edit?usp=drive_link)

For additional background on the FP goal, see the [Food Provisioning Goalkeeper page](https://ohi-goc.github.io/OHI_GOC/chapters/fp.html).
